top_signals.title: GE Sees Potential For More China Deals After Trump-Xi Meeting
top_signals.summary: GE Aerospace remains optimistic that it can secure more aircraft-engine orders from China after President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping met in Beijing last month and manufacturing partner Boeing Co. came home an initial batch of commitments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Inflation inside the electronics you buy may soon become a bit more sticky
top_signals.summary: Most consumers are not familiar with the role resin plays inside electronics like smartphones. A current shortage of the materials may push up prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Can a Forgotten Caribbean Town Become a Spaceport?
top_signals.summary: The Dominican Republic’s plan to build a commercial spaceport in the small town of Oviedo is about far more than rockets. Launch on Demand founder Burton Catledge says the project could create thousands of jobs, attract new investment, and help diversify the country beyond tourism. Supporters envision a new hub for aerospace, technology, and education, while local residents hope the project can bring opportunities to a region that has long felt overlooked. But before launches begin, developers must build the infrastructure, workforce, and regulatory framework needed to support an entirely new industry. For many in Oviedo, the spaceport represents a chance to put their town, and perhaps the country itself, on the map.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Women often outlive men. Here's how they should approach their long-term care needs
top_signals.summary: In addition to typically living longer than their husbands, women also are more likely to need long-term care, which can be costly.
